name: neo-bank-automation
description: Playwright + TypeScript end-to-end suite for the ArthaPay neo-bank UI

scripts.report:allure: npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && npx allure open allure-report
scripts.report:advanced: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),{exec}=require('child_process'),p='reports/advanced/latest/index.html';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('No advanced report found — run tests first');process.exit(1);}const abs=path.resolve(p);console.log('Opening: '+abs);exec(process.platform==='win32'?'start \"\" \"'+abs+'\"':process.platform==='darwin'?'open \"'+abs+'\"':'xdg-open \"'+abs+'\"')"
